---
title: "Conference baselines"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Conference baselines}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(comment = NA)
```

For each numeric metric in `schema/metrics.yml`, the sync adds conference context on every player row:

- **`conference_mean_<metric>`** and **`conference_sd_<metric>`** describe the league within that row’s conference (same stat type: pitching vs batting).
- **`conference_delta_<metric>`** expresses how far the row sits from that mean in SD units (direction follows the metric’s `direction` field in the YAML catalog).

Team rows reuse the same naming on aggregated team statistics. Baselines are computed on the **combined** season dataset so a pitcher’s “conference” slice matches everyone else’s for that conference and year.
